item.description:
# LocalMeet 0.2.38
## Changes since build-37-3747e64
- Bump version to 0.2 for release (371a544) - Add changelog for 0.2.0 (b7a2972) - Document repository conventions and contribution rules (5a84c98) - Move the speaker-count picker into the transcribe dialog; fix the sheet (3623a12) - Generate summaries as grammar-constrained JSON (e40c46d) - Move summarization to llama.cpp and drop the last bundled Python (4dbeec9) - Remove legacy whisper-cli and Parakeet-MLX transcription paths (f59df56) - Replace Python/pyannote diarization with native FluidAudio (bd35e5e) - Add Mac App Store distribution plan (30aa12a)
Build: 38 Commit: 371a544
